caption: The video features a person with a distinctive, spiky gray wig and a red bow tie, sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." The individual is wearing headphones and appears to be engaged in conversation, gesturing with their hand as they speak. The background shows a well-lit room with various items on shelves, including hats and other accessories, suggesting a casual yet professional setting. Another person with red hair is visible in the background, possibly another participant or host of the show. The overall atmosphere seems lively and interactive, with the focus on the person speaking into the microphone.
